title: Winter and Severe Weather Resources - 211info
text: This page contains winter and severe weather-related resources based on the information shared with 211info by providers as resources become available. Check this page frequently for the most up-to-date information. Opening hours are based on specific county and individual agency criteria. Resources listed on this page can and will change depending on the current event and the availability of resources. If you know of a shelter that is not listed or information that needs to be updated, please contact our Resource Team at 503-416-2698 or by email: [email protected] . CLICK A COUNTY BUTTON BELOW TO JUMP TO A SPECIFIC COUNTY BAKER BENTON CLACKAMAS CLATSOP COLUMBIA COOS CROOK CURRY DESCHUTES DOUGLAS GILLAIM GRANT HARNEY HOOD RIVER JACKSON JEFFERSON JOSEPHINE KLAMATH LAKE LANE LINCOLN LINN MALHEUR MARION MORROW MULTNOMAH POLK SHERMAN TILLAMOOK UMATILLA UNION WALLOWA WASCO WASHINGTON WHEELER YAMHILL If you are looking for other resources, contact 211info , or search using our online database . During times of emergency incident response, 211info’s answer rate may vary .
